challenged_findings.reason: Policy 04 Art.7 and 05 Art.6 explicitly require training lodging to use training standards regardless of travel context
17 records within both standards still constitute classification violation under 05 Art.6
All 48 records have special_approval=0, no exemption applies
Neither 04 第七条 nor 05 第六条 distinguish trainer from trainee; any training lodging follows training standards

supporting_evidence: 04_travel_expense.md 第七条: 培训期间住宿不适用差旅住宿表
05_training_expense.md 第六条: 培训住宿标准不得与差旅住宿标准混用
全部48条记录reason含'培训'关键词,无特殊审批
rationale: 48条违规全部经独立复核维持:不得以差旅正当性(legitimate_travel)、无财务影响(no_financial_impact)、讲师身份(trainer_vs_trainee)为由豁免,制度无相关例外条款。17条双达标记录属流程性分类违规,仍违反05第六条禁止混用要求。
